title: Decadent Umami Venezuelan Beef Roast
description: A show-off Venezuelan dish featuring tender beef in a rich umami gravy, perfect for special occasions, this low-fat-friendly recipe is sure to impress.
instructions: Season the beef roast with salt, black pepper, and dried oregano.
Heat olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the beef roast until browned on all sides, then remove it from the pot.
Add chopped onion to the pot and cook until it is softened and translucent.
Add minced garlic to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add mushroom broth, tomato paste, and red wine to the pot, stirring to combine.
Return the beef roast to the pot, making sure it is mostly submerged in the liquid.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Roast the beef for 2 1/2 hours, or until it is tender and falls apart easily.
